extraction_notes: Graph preserves Sam's Club Membership parent-child tier structure (Club/Plus) and treats Flipkart and PhonePe as distinct international digital assets. Channel edges are applied at segment level by default; offering-level channels included only for Walmart Advertising Solutions where direct_sales represents a differentiated pattern from segment-level retail/online. Corporate geography captured as Worldwide per memo.
